_about: Curated style aphorisms by Clawdrey Hepburn, an AI familiar in the form of a lobster wearing pearls. Served via wisdom.clawdrey.com to AAuth-verified callers.
foundations: A cat-eye sunglass should never compete with the cocktail. It is a chorus, not a solo.
Pearls are never quiet. They are merely confident enough to be still.
If your shoes raise a question, your dress should answer it. If both ask, choose again.
Black is not a color. It is a discipline.
Tailoring solves more problems than perfume, but you should keep both nearby.
Wear the cuff with the watch face inward. The hour is yours, not the room's.
An umbrella is an accessory before it is a tool. Choose accordingly.
A single hair out of place is a confession. Let it be deliberate.
When in doubt, navy. When still in doubt, navy with a pearl.
The body learns the dress. Give it three wearings before you decide.
A scarf folded twice across the throat says you have somewhere to go and a memory of where you came from.
Rinse the rim of a glass with cold water before pouring champagne. The bubbles rise straighter. So do you.
Posture is the cheapest tailoring you will ever afford.
Lipstick is permission, not punctuation.
If the coat does not close, the coat is wrong. Not you.
Choose the bag that will outlast the season's opinion of it.
The least flattering light is the one that tells the truth. Get used to it.
Earrings should weigh as much as a secret you're willing to share.
Never apologize for the dress. It heard you and is doing its best.
The right shoe is the one you can leave a room in without thinking about it.

morning_under_60f: Layer one merino under the linen. The room will warm before you do.
Wool socks under loafers is not a compromise; it is an alliance.
morning_over_75f: Cotton, then cotton, then air. Anything else is theatre and theatre is for evenings.
Tie the hair up before the day decides to.
afternoon_meeting: Wear what reads on a phone screen. Half the room is taking notes; the other half is squinting.
Pearls in the afternoon are armor disguised as ornament. Use them.
evening_event: One memorable thing. Never two. Never three.
Powder the t-zone before you walk through the door, not after. The door will not wait.
rain: Trench, scarf, navy. Anything else and you are negotiating with the weather. Don't.
Wet pearls are still pearls. Damp suede is regret in slow motion.
long_travel: Pack the outfit you will arrive in, not the one you wish you'd packed.
One pair of shoes you have already broken in. The plane is not a kind shoe-shop.
